en: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the people of Judah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah, king of Judah (that was the first year of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon),
zh: 猶大王約西亞的兒子約雅敬第四年，就是巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒第一年，有話臨到耶利米，是關於猶大眾民的。

en: which Jeremiah the prophet spoke to all the people of Judah and all the inhabitants of Jerusalem:
zh: 耶利米先知就把這話告訴猶大眾民和耶路撒冷所有的居民，說：

en: "For twenty-three years, from the thirteenth year of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah, to this day, the word of the LORD has come to me, and I have spoken persistently to you, but you have not listened.
zh: “從猶大王亞們的兒子約西亞第十三年直到今日，這二十三年來，常有耶和華的話臨到我，我也不斷對你們傳講，你們卻不聽從。

en: You have neither listened nor inclined your ears to hear, although the LORD persistently sent to you all his servants the prophets,
zh: 耶和華雖然不斷差遣他的僕人眾先知到你們那裡去；但你們卻沒有聽從，毫不留心。

en: saying, 'Turn now, every one of you, from his evil way and evil deeds, and dwell upon the land that the LORD has given to you and your fathers from of old and forever.
zh: 他們對你們說：‘你們各人要悔改，離開自己的惡道和邪惡的行為，就可以住在耶和華賜給你們和你們列祖的土地上，直到永永遠遠。’”

en: Do not go after other gods to serve and worship them, or provoke me to anger with the work of your hands. Then I will do you no harm.'
zh: “你們不要隨從別的神，不要事奉敬拜他們，也不可容你們手所作的惹我發怒；這樣，我就不會使禍患臨到你們。

en: Yet you have not listened to me, declares the LORD, that you might provoke me to anger with the work of your hands to your own harm.
zh: 但你們沒有聽從我，竟容你們手所作的惹我發怒，自招禍害。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Therefore thus says the LORD of hosts: Because you have not obeyed my words,
zh: 因此，萬軍之耶和華這樣說：“因為你們沒有聽從我的話，

en: behold, I will send for all the tribes of the north, declares the LORD, and for Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon, my servant, and I will bring them against this land and its inhabitants, and against all these surrounding nations. I will devote them to destruction, and make them a horror, a hissing, and an everlasting desolation.
zh: 看哪！我要打發人去徵召北方的眾族，和我的僕人巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒，領他們來攻擊這地和這地的居民，以及周圍的列國；我要把他們徹底消滅，使他們成為令人驚駭，受人嗤笑的對象，和永遠荒廢的地方。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Moreover, I will banish from them the voice of mirth and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom and the voice of the bride, the grinding of the millstones and the light of the lamp.
zh: “我要從他們中間除掉歡喜和快樂的聲音，新郎和新婦的聲音，推磨的聲音和燈的亮光。

en: This whole land shall become a ruin and a waste, and these nations shall serve the king of Babylon seventy years.
zh: 這地要全變為荒廢，令人驚駭；這些國家要服事巴比倫王七十年。

en: Then after seventy years are completed, I will punish the king of Babylon and that nation, the land of the Chaldeans, for their iniquity, declares the LORD, making the land an everlasting waste.
zh: “七十年滿了以後，我要按著他們的罪孽懲罰巴比倫王和那國，就是迦勒底人之地，使它永遠荒涼。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: I will bring upon that land all the words that I have uttered against it, everything written in this book, which Jeremiah prophesied against all the nations.
zh: “我必使我所說攻擊那地的一切話應驗在那地；我所說的，就是一切記錄在這書上的，是耶利米攻擊列國所說的預言。

en: For many nations and great kings shall make slaves even of them, and I will recompense them according to their deeds and the work of their hands."
zh: 因為許多國家和大君王將要奴役迦勒底人，我必按著他們的作為和他們手所作的報應他們。”

en: Thus the LORD, the God of Israel, said to me: "Take from my hand this cup of the wine of wrath, and make all the nations to whom I send you drink it.
zh: 耶和華以色列的 神對我這樣說：“你從我的手中拿這杯烈怒的酒，給列國喝，就是我差遣你去的列國。

en: They shall drink and stagger and be crazed because of the sword that I am sending among them."
zh: 他們喝了，就會東倒西歪，瘋狂亂性，因為我打發刀劍到他們中間去。”

en: So I took the cup from the LORD's hand, and made all the nations to whom the LORD sent me drink it:
zh: 於是我從耶和華的手中接過這杯，給列國喝，就是耶和華差遣我去的列國，

en: Jerusalem and the cities of Judah, its kings and officials, to make them a desolation and a waste, a hissing and a curse, as at this day;
zh: 包括耶路撒冷、猶大的城鎮，和她的君王、領袖，使這些城鎮荒廢，成為令人驚駭、被人嗤笑、咒罵的對象，好像今天一樣。

en: Pharaoh king of Egypt, his servants, his officials, all his people,
zh: 又包括法老，就是埃及王，和他的臣僕、王侯，以及全體人民，

en: and all the mixed tribes among them; all the kings of the land of Uz and all the kings of the land of the Philistines (Ashkelon, Gaza, Ekron, and the remnant of Ashdod);
zh: 並所有外族的人；還有烏斯地的眾王、非利士人之地的眾王，就是亞實基倫、迦薩，以革倫和亞實突餘剩的人的王；

en: Edom, Moab, and the sons of Ammon;
zh: 並有以東、摩押、亞捫、

en: all the kings of Tyre, all the kings of Sidon, and the kings of the coastland across the sea;
zh: 推羅的列王、西頓的列王、海外島嶼的列王、

en: Dedan, Tema, Buz, and all who cut the corners of their hair;
zh: 底但、提瑪、布斯，所有剃除鬢髮的部落、

en: all the kings of Arabia and all the kings of the mixed tribes who dwell in the desert;
zh: 阿拉伯的列王、住在沙漠的外族人的列王、

en: all the kings of Zimri, all the kings of Elam, and all the kings of Media;
zh: 心利的列王、以攔的列王、瑪代的列王、

en: all the kings of the north, far and near, one after another, and all the kingdoms of the world that are on the face of the earth. And after them the king of Babylon shall drink.
zh: 北方遠近的列王，一個一個，以及地上的萬國，就是在這地面上的列國，都喝了；他們喝了以後，示沙克王也要喝。

en: "Then you shall say to them, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: Drink, be drunk and vomit, fall and rise no more, because of the sword that I am sending among you.'
zh: “你要對他們說：‘萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：你們要喝，並要喝醉，嘔吐，以致跌倒，不能再起來，因為我打發刀劍到你們中間去。’

en: "And if they refuse to accept the cup from your hand to drink, then you shall say to them, 'Thus says the LORD of hosts: You must drink!
zh: 如果他們不肯從你的手中接過這杯來喝，你就要對他們說：‘萬軍之耶和華這樣說：你們一定要喝。

en: For behold, I begin to work disaster at the city that is called by my name, and shall you go unpunished? You shall not go unpunished, for I am summoning a sword against all the inhabitants of the earth, declares the LORD of hosts.'
zh: 因為，看哪！我既然在那稱為我名下的城中先降災禍，你們真可免受懲罰嗎？你們必不能免受懲罰，因為我要呼喚刀劍來攻擊這地所有的居民。’”這是萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

en: "You, therefore, shall prophesy against them all these words, and say to them: "' The LORD will roar from on high, and from his holy habitation utter his voice; he will roar mightily against his fold, and shout, like those who tread grapes, against all the inhabitants of the earth.
zh: “因此你要對他們宣講這一切話，對他們說： ‘耶和華必從高天吼叫， 從他的聖所發聲； 他必大聲吼叫攻擊自己的羊圈； 他要對地上所有的居民呼喊， 像那些踹葡萄的人呼喊一樣。

en: The clamor will resound to the ends of the earth, for the LORD has an indictment against the nations; he is entering into judgment with all flesh, and the wicked he will put to the sword, declares the LORD.'
zh: 吶喊的聲音要傳到地極， 因為耶和華要控告列國， 也要審判萬人； 至於惡人，他必把他們交給刀劍。’” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts: Behold, disaster is going forth from nation to nation, and a great tempest is stirring from the farthest parts of the earth!
zh: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “看哪！必有災禍發出， 從這國直到那國； 必有大風暴從地極颳起。”

en: "And those pierced by the LORD on that day shall extend from one end of the earth to the other. They shall not be lamented, or gathered, or buried; they shall be dung on the surface of the ground.
zh: 到那日，從地的這邊到地的那邊，都必有被耶和華刺死的人；必沒有人為他們悲哀，沒有人收殮他們、埋葬他們；他們都必在地面上成為糞肥。

en: "Wail, you shepherds, and cry out, and roll in ashes, you lords of the flock, for the days of your slaughter and dispersion have come, and you shall fall like a choice vessel.
zh: 牧人啊，你們要哀號，呼叫！ 羊群的領袖啊，你們要在灰塵中打滾！ 因為你們被宰殺的日子已經到了； 我要粉碎你們， 你們要跌倒，像珍貴的器皿跌碎一樣。

en: No refuge will remain for the shepherds, nor escape for the lords of the flock.
zh: 牧人無處逃避， 羊群的領袖無法逃脫。

en: A voice- the cry of the shepherds, and the wail of the lords of the flock! For the LORD is laying waste their pasture,
zh: 聽啊！牧人的哀叫， 羊群的領袖的悲號， 因為耶和華正在毀壞他們的牧場。

en: and the peaceful folds are devastated because of the fierce anger of the LORD.
zh: 因為耶和華猛烈的怒氣， 平靜的羊圈毀壞了。

en: Like a lion he has left his lair, for their land has become a waste because of the sword of the oppressor, and because of his fierce anger."
zh: 他像獅子離開了洞穴， 他們的國土實在變成荒野， 因為欺壓人的刀劍 ， 和他猛烈的怒氣臨到他們。
